ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL linking to the original post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the post */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the post's popularity */,
  "covid_mentions" TEXT /* Mentions of COVID-19 in the post */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "addiction_type" TEXT /* Type of addiction the post is related to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user who created the post */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is anonymous */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is sticky (important and stays at the top) */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is locked (no further comments allowed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for notifications */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "recovery_start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started their recovery journey */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's identity is verified */,
  "is_suspended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_body" TEXT /* Body content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is anonymous */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is deleted */,
  "deletion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for deletion, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., addiction type, support, recovery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., positive, neutral, negative) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment analysis was last updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the metrics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the post */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to comments */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Overall engagement score based on views, likes, shares, and comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., delete, edit) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post or comment that was targeted */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was automated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator if the notification has been read */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, post, moderation) */,
  "is_dismissed" INTEGER /* Indicator if the notification has been dismissed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 mention entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post where COVID-19 is mentioned */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* Count of mentions of COVID-19 in the post */,
  "first_mention_date" TEXT /* Date of the first mention of COVID-19 */,
  "last_mention_date" TEXT /* Date of the last mention of COVID-19 */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Context of the mentions (e.g., impact, coping strategies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
